title: Paris Urban Quality Index
description: Arrondissement-level UQI components by decade. Transit access measured as metro stations per km² (not per capita) to avoid population-denominator instability. Infrastructure variables (electricity, piped_water, drainage) retained but excluded from default selection due to near-zero cross-sectional variance after 1920.

variables.label: Metro density
variables.description: Cumulative metro stations per km² of arrondissement area by decade opening date.

variables.label: Hospital access
variables.description: Major hospital facilities per 100,000 residents, cumulative by founding decade.

variables.label: Green space
variables.description: Public park and garden surface area per resident, cumulative by park opening date.

variables.label: Libraries & museums
variables.description: Public libraries and museums per 100,000 residents, cumulative by founding decade.

variables.label: Crowding
variables.description: Average household size. Lower is better — reflects housing quality and space.

variables.label: Electricity access
variables.description: Estimated share of households with electricity. Near-uniform after 1930 — included for completeness, not differentiation.

variables.label: Piped water
variables.description: Share of households with piped water. Near-uniform after 1900.

variables.label: Sewerage
variables.description: Share of households connected to sewer. Near-uniform after 1900.

sourceNotes.transit_access: RATP station opening dates from Wikidata (P1619); arrondissement areas fixed. Cumulative stations per km² by decade.
sourceNotes.hospital_access: Major hospitals with founding dates from Wikipedia 'List of hospitals in Paris'; spatial assignment by arrondissement address. Per 100k using INSEE population.
sourceNotes.green_space: Paris Open Data espaces_verts dataset (2022 baseline); historical additions from dated catalog: Tuileries 1564, Luxembourg 1612, Palais-Royal 1784, Monceau 1778, Buttes-Chaumont 1867, Montsouris 1869, Vincennes perimeter 1860, Bois de Boulogne 1852, Bercy 1997, André-Citroën 1992, La Villette 1987.
sourceNotes.third_spaces: BNF library catalog + Wikipedia list of Paris museums with founding years; per 100k using INSEE population.
sourceNotes.persons_per_dwelling: INSEE Dossier Complet RP2020 table LOG T1; pre-1968 from French historical census summaries.
sourceNotes.population: INSEE RP series; pre-1968 from Annuaire statistique de la ville de Paris.
sourceNotes.density: Computed from population / fixed arrondissement area (km²).
sourceNotes.electricity: Pre-1930 estimates from Beltran (1991) 'La vie électrique'; 1930+ set to 100.
sourceNotes.drainage: Reid (1991) 'Paris Sewers and Sewermen'; 1900+ set to 100 following Haussmann completion.

method: Equal-weight UQI using default-selected variables: transit_access (stations/km²), hospital_access (per 100k), green_space (m²/resident), third_spaces (per 100k), persons_per_dwelling (inverted). Min-max normalized within city and decade. Infrastructure variables (electricity, piped_water, drainage) excluded from default selection due to near-zero cross-sectional variance in Paris after 1920. Transit measured as cumulative stations per km² of arrondissement area to avoid population-denominator instability.
